titleStmt.title: SII 34.380: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 380. Kuḷattūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the ruined Siva temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 5+2nd year, Panguni 20 = A.D. 1223?.

The nāṭṭavar of Kuḷattūr in Kōṉāḍu together with the temple trustees resolved a dispute between the temple and a Vikkiramachōḻa-nāḍaḻvāṉ as to the ownership of a canal. It was agreed that water might be baled out from the canal within some specified limits to irrigate the fields of the latter and that one half of the income on fishing (pāsippāṭṭam) in the canal should be shared equally between the two contending parties.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟapaṉmarāṉa tirubhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 5vatu Etir 2vatu paṅkuṉimātam 2 10tiyati kOṉāṭṭuk kuḷattūr nāṭṭavarum Ivvūruṭaiyar cuntaracOḷīccuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kOyil tāṉattārum kārai Ūr Araiyakaḷil maṅkāmaik kāttāṉāṉa vikkirama cOḻa nāṭāḻvā
rkku Icaivu piṭipāṭu Iṭṭa paricāvatu kōpuṟattukku mēṟkum calliya virutti varampukku vaṭakkum Aṇukkaṉ vayakkalukku kiḻakkum catturukālaṉ vayakkalukkut teṟkum Uḷpaṭṭa Āṟu Ivar tammuṭaiya Āṟeṉṟum tāṅkaḷ nāyiṉāratu Eṉṟum collukaiyil Inta Ellaikkuḷ nīr Uḷḷatu Ivaruṭaiya catturukālaṉ vayakkalukku Iṟaikkak kaṭavarkaḷākavum
pācippāṭṭam Uḷḷatu nāyiṉārkku Oṉṟu pātiyum vikkiramacōḻa nāṭāḻvārkku Oṉṟu pātiyum Āka canta
Digital edition of SII 34.380 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
